textByHashes.7623e0de67f1d17d2d9b87547c75383476695aab: Hello again! Would you like to talk about the Wilderness Achievement Diary? Or would you like to sell me ecumenical keys?
textByHashes.54d88bfadaa408e4032319d0fbb2f234538ace8b: I'm Jeffery, the taskmaster for the Wilderness Achievement Diary.
textByHashes.a3ce6917493798f96c6dcaea2a1ad5fcd4b11c45: It's a diary that helps you keep track of particular achievements. In the Wilderness it can help you discover some quite useful things. Eventually, with enough exploration, the inhabitants will reward you.
textByHashes.ca64dc2762531723f270ebfeb7a0717ec1d4c1e6: You can see the list of tasks on the side-panel.
textByHashes.9e0afb5c6765ff4fecdd18212098f112517389ad: You should bring them to me, if so. I'm not buying something I can't see you carrying.
textByHashes.82fe63b1f6a77cbba6bfd41a0e58ca2b40d5b35b: Well, there are four different Wilderness Swords, which match up with the four levels of difficulty. Each has the same rewards as the previous level and some additional benefits too... which tier of rewards would you like to
textByHashes.9ca373d0aa8ede8ed2daf9b1aff01e43ff22d2b8: If you complete all of the easy tasks in the Wilderness, you can speak to Lundail at the Mage Arena every day to receive 40 free runes and you can teleport to either Edgeville or Ardougne from the Wilderness lever.
textByHashes.a318b13f76dde991a700cce37aeda42fb1f66687: In addition to the easy rewards, Mandrith will give you a 20% discount off entry to the Resource Area, you'll cut Ents faster, you can access a shortcut in the deep Wilderness dungeon. You can also own 4 ecumenical
textByHashes.4cb852d487e2fb6490b65b725fa85fbbac756872: keys at once and receive 80 runes a day from Lundail, and you can find loot in the chests at the Rogues' Castle. Finally, you can access the lairs of Callisto, Venenatis and Vet'ion, three fearsome Wilderness
textByHashes.65bc42ad3849c092b1a71da926882b3879833921: In addition to the easy and medium benefits, the sword can teleport you to the Fountain of Rune once per day, you'll get 50% more lava shards when grinding scales and even cheaper access to the Resource Area.
textByHashes.f1b662a4f56edb50896cb42ef851a1f539e94f21: You can own 5 ecumenical keys, Lundail will give you 120 free runes each day, and you'll get increased loot from the chests at the Rogues' Castle. You can also telegrab Wine of Zamorak from spawns in the
textByHashes.9b1d8a50e77c1fede9d68a6f2f5723f76f70c920: Wilderness in banknote form, and control which Obelisk you want to travel to. Also, I'll be willing to buy ecumenical keys off you for 61,500 coins each. Finally, you can access the lairs of Artio, Spindel and Calvar'ion,
textByHashes.44dcd0076c7ec08564072854df5776e0296e3772: In addition to the previous tiers of rewards, access to the Resource Area is free and the sword will now give you unlimited teleports to the Fountain of Rune. All dragon bone drops in the Wilderness become noted and
textByHashes.7301dcccae5895f0bd6cceddbe34a2ca94bb5b4f: Lundail will give you 200 free runes per day and the rate at which you catch Dark Crabs is increased.
textByHashes.784b57f92ad4cde5d00330cc5845ea2aaf9bce21: Just complete the tasks in the Wilderness so they're ticked off, then come and speak to me for your rewards.
textByHashes.4155c7969234a1ba273704b431997726895b163b: Ah, you would like to be able to bury them on the spot? Would you like to receive bones in their proper form, rather than as banknotes?
textByHashes.652955493870663726cf3d3ccde960d7064fc54e: Very well, I have done that for you. Speak with me again if you change your mind.
textByHashes.7fad517f0b331630ef2cbfcb8fc54678903e987f: Very well. Speak with me again if you change your mind.
textByHashes.137675ed516653f17cafd41edc1057780c38d71d: Ah, you would like to be able to carry lots of them? Banknotes are very convenient for that. Do you want to receive noted lava dragon bones?
textByHashes.8e099187a868e3b6eca57bf212d856fe987d09a6: I can see that, well done! You'll be wanting your reward then!
textByHashes.6cac27e0d8e9827332ff0db56cf9ad1df5191ddb: You need at least two inventory spaces, make some space and come back.
textByHashes.d646a6ba1fbe19ed3982c3496e418fe1412e9176: This sword is a symbol of your exploration of the Wilderness. Speak to Lundail at the Mage Arena every day to receive 40 free runes and you can teleport to either Edgeville or Ardougne from the Wilderness lever.
textByHashes.35e1fff6b7a3097d1a98f5e4680f6987233a7a16: If you ever lose your sword, come back to me to reclaim it.
textByHashes.301595102e8a57e7caa7060e716a115314dc22a3: You need to complete all of the easy tasks too before I can reward you for the more difficult sets.
textByHashes.757917941290e3207407e954b220284ca0805572: I've upgraded your Wilderness Sword for you. Mandrith will give you a 20% discount off entry to the Resource Area, you'll cut Ents faster, you can access a shortcut in the deep Wilderness dungeon. You'll also
textByHashes.f440a94a09b318a8d1f0f3e6241f01b420afeb94: receive increase rewards from the chests in Rogues' Castle, and you can also now own 4 ecumenical keys and receive 80 runes a day from Lundail.
textByHashes.d42a4e2fb8839c4c257d55417d1be07ef65a934b: You need to complete all of the easy and medium tasks too before I can reward you for the more difficult sets.
textByHashes.51f67f477b102b9eda577062ac7717442d76b809: I've upgraded your Wilderness Sword for you. It can now teleport you to the Fountain of Rune once per day, you'll get 50% more lava shards when grinding scales and even cheaper access to the Resource Area.
textByHashes.5f1bf5738c5d462158b9cce17fb58a6398fa26c9: You can now own 5 ecumenical keys, and Lundail will give you 120 free runes each day. You can also telegrab Wine of Zamorak from spawns in the Wilderness in banknote form, and control which Obelisk
textByHashes.0bca3abf954b72677ac5fd443a7a3cd36c31a47b: you want to travel to. You'll also receive further increased rewards from the chests in Rogues' Castle. Finally, I'll be willing to buy ecumenical keys off you for 61,500 coins each.
textByHashes.95d81b52887ddbc363b157d5c36493c549fd73f7: You need to complete all of the easy, medium and hard tasks too before I can reward you for the elite task set.
textByHashes.00a4343ad766642553fe940ba5e6431d9548b39f: I can see that, well done! You've completed all of the tasks in the Wilderness! Here's your reward!
textByHashes.43c9cb7a670174489c2ad34cc396b9899ebc5578: I've upgraded your Wilderness Sword for you. Access to the Resource Area is now free and the sword will now give you unlimited teleports to the Fountain of Rune. All dragon bone drops in the Wilderness are now
textByHashes.6db63607619d32035a05e485fa68b32fc5ea6cdd: noted and Lundail will give you 200 free runes per day and the rate at which you catch Dark Crabs has been increased.
textByHashes.370b28e71fcd8958dedb1566763e9586da7d3efb: Now, would you like to talk about the Wilderness Achievement Diary? Or would you like to sell me ecumenical keys?
